vlm_note: All 4 settlements render as near-identical grey (meta TejaReddy=BLACK, ThePhantom=WHITE both muddy at overlay scale), so player split came from grant anchors + road luminance. Grant-locked 2nd settlements: ThePhantom {BRICK,ORE,SHEEP}==v3 [0,1,6]; TejaReddy {BRICK,WHEAT,WOOD}==v11 [2,9,10]. Roads crop-confirmed (v7-v8 sits between two ore tiles but the dark road bar is distinct from the ~150 ore grey).
